title: Living in Boulder vlog 6 - 16 - 2017: Buildings of Rome book

enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a casual daily vlog update from Boulder, covering getting a haircut, buying new headphones/earphones, plans to do car work at his mom's house, and mentioning he is working on an alphabetical book project he describes as being for his grandma, which he expects will take a long time.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: expects it to take a long time but is making progress

transcript.text: Hello, Living in Boulder V-logs. So this is my green paper. I'm looking forward to seeing how it works out with the program. It's a little bit more dark over here, starting here, just from the way that the lighting hits and the angle.

Um, but all this part around my head is good. Sit right around here. So, um, so today I got up, I was working pretty late, got up at like 11 or something. And then I went in, I needed to get a haircut, so I got a haircut. And I wanted to get new earphones. So Radio Shack was having 50% off, so I got a pair of headsets and two pairs of earphones, Wi-Fi there.

And, um, and, uh, and then came back and been working on my side. I was going to go to my mom's house to do stuff with my car. I saw my car, but I put this up. I'm going to put the other, um, stuff that was here up on my bathroom door to replace it, I think, today. So I'll do this car stuff tomorrow.
Um, I was listening to different Wikipedia articles. I want to start just giving you the habit of listening to my web, books on my website on, uh, read aloud, because it can read those.

Like, I can listen to it all the way through. Uh, the ones that are only, like, a few hours longer. I'm going to see if I can get and do books all the way through and then try to do longer among the ones.
So, um, um, but, uh, um, I can't drop any ones, though.
You're turning this over there. Um, oh, I'm sweating my ass off in this bathroom.
Um, um, so I guess that's it. Um, oh, the book that I'm working on is, is, uh, um, um, it's, uh, alphabetical, and, uh, it's going to take a long time.
I was working on it a little bit today before I started working on my house, but, uh, that will, that will be a few days.
And then I'm going to do, uh, the Justinian code, the law code of the Romans.
So I'm looking forward to that. That will probably take a couple days, too.
But anyways, I think I've done enough talking. Let's see what this looks like.
